hypothesis: Multimodal foundation model pretraining that jointly encodes SMILES, 3D conformers, and explicit solvent–ion interaction graphs for battery electrolytes will improve out-of-distribution generalization to unseen solvent/salt formulations and device configurations, yielding significantly lower MAE in predicting device-scale metrics (CE, capacity, IC) than SMILES-only foundation models on a hold-out test set with novel moieties.
